New Data Hub Part
We created a new Part that describes how to access and use Data Hub. The Data Hub platform provides interactive analytics capabilities that transform data into clear, actionable visuals. The Payments Dashboard within Data Hub allows authorized users to apply multi-level filtering, view the results as charts or tables, compare your financial institutionâs performance to anonymized peers of similar size and product usage, and export insights into multiple formats.
